pageContext.name: Kakashi Hatake
pageContext.description: From Naruto: Shippuden, the famed Sharingan Hero - Kakashi Hatake rejoins S.H.Figuarts with newly redesigned posability!  The anime figure includes the main body, optional head (headband up), three optional expressions (headband up), two optional expressions (headband down), five right and six left optional hands, spell-weaving hand, and his Icha Icha Paradise book for optimal display!  Add this Kakashi figure to your Naruto: Shippuden figure collection today!
